content.speakerText: This view is insane! Could you take a pic of me with the castle?
content.speakerTextCn: 这景色太棒了！能帮我拍张和城堡的合影吗？

options.text: Sure! Stand close to the wall—I'll get the whole thing.
I'm busy right now, you should ask someone else.
I don't have a camera, sorry.
Why don't you use a selfie stick?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了请求并提供了具体帮助（站墙边、拍全），符合礼貌且实用的回应原则。选项2态度冷漠，不符合旅游场景的互助氛围；选项3虽真实但未提供替代方案，显得消极；选项4回避请求，未体现帮助意愿。

content.speakerText: Can you also take a group photo with all of us?
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我们所有人拍张合照吗？

options.text: Absolutely! Everyone line up—I'll use the timer.
I can't, I'm not a professional photographer.
You should ask the guy over there.
I'll take one, but only if you all smile.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应并给出具体操作（排好队、用定时器），体现合作态度。选项2和3推卸责任，不符合导游角色；选项4虽有回应但附加条件，显得不够友好。

content.speakerText: Hey, would you mind taking a photo of me by the fountain? I don't want to miss this moment.
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你能帮我在这喷泉边拍张照吗？我不想错过这一刻。

options.text: Of course! I'll make sure you're in the center.
I'm not good with cameras, maybe you should use a tripod.
Can you take your own photo with your phone?

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应并承诺细节帮助（确保你在中心），体现体贴和专业。选项2推卸责任并建议对方自己解决，不符合求助情境；选项3和4缺乏同理心，未体现旅游场景中的互助精神。

content.template: Could you ___ a pic of me with the castle?
content.hint: 拍照时最常用的动词搭配
组织合影时常用的指令短语
表达‘拍几张’的自然口语表达

content.speakerText: This view is insane! Could you take a pic of me with the castle?
content.speakerTextCn: 这景色太棒了！能帮我拍张和城堡的合影吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! I'll stand back a bit so you're in frame.
Of course! Let me adjust the angle—I'll take two shots.
No problem! Just smile and I'll capture the whole castle behind you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确答应请求并提供帮助
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当动词如 take, capture, stand
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如 'No problem', 'just smile', 'I'll stand back'

content.speakerText: Can you also take a group photo with all of us?
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我们所有人拍张合照吗？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! Everyone, please gather here—I'll use the timer.
I'm not great with phones, but I'll do my best! Can you all stand close?
Sure thing! Let me set the timer so I can join you too.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并说明操作方式（如使用定时器）
语言准确性：使用正确短语如 'gather here', 'use the timer', 'do my best'
表达自然度：语气友好，包含谦虚或协作表达（如 'I'm not great, but...'）

content.speakerText: Hey, I'd love to get a photo with you in front of the landmark. Could you help?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我想在地标前和你拍张照，你能帮个忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Where should I stand? I'll make sure the landmark is behind us.
Sure! Let me check the camera settings first—I want it to look great.
Happy to! Just give me a second to switch to photo mode.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确同意并主动参与构图或准备
语言准确性：使用恰当动词如 stand, check, switch，结构完整
表达自然度：语气热情，使用口语连接词如 'just', 'happy to', 'a second'
